sentence: 请画一条五厘米长的线段。
pinyin: Qǐng huà yī tiáo wǔ límǐ cháng de xiànduàn.
english: Please draw a line segment five centimeters long.

sentence: 访问者问了她很多私人问题。
pinyin: Fǎngwènzhě wènle tā hěn duō sīrén wèntí.
english: The interviewer asked her many personal questions.

meaning: 1. fingerprint; 2. the arches, loops and whorls on the fingers
english: The phone can be unlocked with a fingerprint.

sentence: 村民每年都祭拜水神求风调雨顺。
pinyin: Cūnmín měi nián dōu jìbài shuǐshén qiú fēngtiáoyǔshùn.
english: Villagers pray to the river god every year for good weather.

meaning: 1. clauses and sub-clauses (in formal document); 2. entry (in a dictio
sentence: 这本词典每天会新增几个条目。
pinyin: Zhè běn cídiǎn měi tiān huì xīnzēng jǐ gè tiáomù.
english: This dictionary adds several new entries every day.
